review_text: The new course material is absolutely fantastic and very easy to follow!
I am confused by the recent grading system, it doesn't make any sense.
The library facilities are okay, but the wifi is sometimes slow.
Excellent support from the teaching staff during project work.
Terrible experience with the online portal, it crashed during my exam.
I love the campus environment, very peaceful and great for studying.
The food in the cafeteria is too expensive and lacks variety.
Professor Smith's lectures are incredibly inspiring. Highly recommend!
The assignment deadlines are unreasonable and stressful.
Standard procedure followed without any issues.
